reach_why: Extends familiar fallibilist critiques of benchmarks and evaluation, but does not open clearly unprecedented explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links benchmark curation, oscillating search, and evaluator fallibility into one underdetermination framework.
falsifiable_why: Parts are testable via benchmark and evaluator studies, but core underdetermination claim remains partly interpretive.
explanation: Knowledge evaluation is fallible: benchmarks, communication, and human judgment can all misclassify genuine novelty.
